positive: A symmetrical, stylized graphic design featuring a majestic, glowing celestial whale swimming through a vibrant, nebula-filled ocean. The whale has intricate bioluminescent patterns and is framed by swirling galaxies and abstract star fields. The overall composition should be highly contrasted, favoring deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted with electric cyan, glowing gold, and ethereal purple accents. Clean, sharp vector art style with a subtle gradient glow effect, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Central subject is the whale silhouette, perfectly centered. High detail, mythic, fantasy concept art, flat graphic composition, clean lines, symmetrical balance. Minimalist composition, bold outlines.
